name: 白大褂医生形象照（男）
description: 专业医生形象照，展现医者仁心与专业权威，适合医师、主任医师、医疗专家
style_prompt: Professional doctor portrait, trustworthy and compassionate expression, medical authority with warmth, clean clinical yet human photography
background_prompt: Soft blurred hospital corridor or clean medical office, white and light blue tones, sterile but welcoming environment
clothing_prompt: White lab coat over light blue or white medical scrubs, clean stethoscope optional, professional medical attire
lighting_prompt: Bright clean medical lighting, soft and even, trustworthy and clear, no dramatic shadows
color_tone: Clean medical whites and soft blues, pure and trustworthy palette, natural healthy skin tones

name: 白大褂医生形象照（女）
description: 女性医生形象照，展现专业素养与温柔关怀，适合女医师、主任医师、医疗专家
style_prompt: Female doctor portrait, professional and caring expression, medical expertise with feminine warmth, clean and approachable
background_prompt: Soft blurred modern clinic background, gentle natural light from windows, clean and comforting medical space
clothing_prompt: White lab coat over pastel scrubs or professional dress, minimal jewelry, neat professional medical appearance
lighting_prompt: Soft bright lighting with gentle warmth, flattering and trustworthy, clean clinical quality
color_tone: Clean whites and soft pastels, gentle blue-green accents, warm natural skin, healing palette

name: 护士形象照
description: 护士职业形象照，展现细心、耐心与专业护理精神，适合护士、护士长、护理专家
style_prompt: Professional nurse portrait, warm and caring expression, dedicated healthcare professional, approachable and trustworthy
background_prompt: Soft blurred patient care area or modern hospital room, warm and comforting tones, human-centered medical environment
clothing_prompt: Clean nursing scrubs in soft blue or pastel, optional nurse cap or badge, neat and professional medical uniform
lighting_prompt: Warm soft lighting, gentle and comforting, natural and inviting, professional care atmosphere
color_tone: Warm comforting palette, soft blues and gentle pinks, natural glowing skin, caring and human tones
